tasks.title: SwiftData schema, domain models, enums, VersionedSchema + v1->v2 migration dry-run
acceptance_criteria: In-memory ModelContainer creates/queries all model types
Migration dry-run test moves a throwaway field v1->v2 with zero data loss
Issue.photoState models pending/ready/missingOrCorrupted explicitly

tasks.title: Repository protocols + SwiftData implementations, ProjectPolicy, IssueFilter
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover cap enforcement and downgrade-lock selection
Archive rules enforced: no hard delete on a non-empty area, duplicate area names allowed
Filter predicates return correct sets against a seeded in-memory store

tasks.title: Protocol shapes for camera/AR/photo/entitlement/report services + fake implementations for seeded-demo build (no real hardware/AR code yet)
acceptance_criteria: Fakes compile against the exact protocol signatures from tech_specs interfaces-json
Fakes can produce a seeded fake Issue with photo end-to-end with no real hardware
No ARKit or AVFoundation concrete implementation exists yet in this task

tasks.title: App shell, DI container, design tokens, root navigation skeleton
acceptance_criteria: App launches to Library using fake services
Seeded fake Issue visible in a placeholder list with zero adapter glue
Truescale/App/TruescaleApp.swift and Truescale/App/DIContainer.swift changes require sign-off from all three other lanes

tasks.title: Seed data harness + M0 exit-criterion verification test
acceptance_criteria: Automated test proves a seeded fake Issue flows through query, detail, thumbnail, and report-snapshot generation with no adapter glue
Migration dry-run test wired into the same test target and passing

tasks.title: Interruption-safe Issue write path: pending creation + incremental field persistence
acceptance_criteria: createPendingIssue persists immediately on shutter success
Severity/status/measurement writes are immediate; note writes debounce ~400ms
Integration test proves all fields persist across a simulated relaunch

tasks.title: Real CameraService (AVCaptureSession) + CameraAvailability states + storage preflight
acceptance_criteria: ready/permissionDenied/temporarilyUnavailable/lowStorage all independently testable via protocol injection
Permission-denied and temporarily-unavailable are visually distinct and neither blocks issue-record creation

tasks.title: PhotoAssetStore: temp-write, off-main compress/downsample, EXIF-GPS strip, atomic move, pending->ready patch (feeds Checkpoint A)
acceptance_criteria: Checkpoint A: simulated kill mid-capture then relaunch-equivalent recovers record+photo intact through the full pending->ready transition
Failed writes patch to missingOrCorrupted with a typed reason, never silently

tasks.title: Manual-only MeasurementProviding implementation wired into unified Measurement schema
acceptance_criteria: Manual measurement path proven end to end into the same schema slot AR will use later
No separate manual/AR record types exist anywhere

tasks.title: Library screen: active/archived lifecycle, first-run flow
acceptance_criteria: Create project -> relaunch-equivalent -> correct lifecycle state persists
Archive/unarchive is one tap and non-destructive
First launch skips an empty library entirely

tasks.title: Workspace screen: Areas/Issues segmented control, inline area creation
acceptance_criteria: Area created/selected without leaving capture context
Duplicate area names allowed
Segment always resets to Areas on fresh entry into Workspace

tasks.title: Capture screen: live camera, chips, MeasurementField, autosave-visible checkmark (buildable against fakes on day one)
acceptance_criteria: Builds and is demoable against Fakes from T-003 before real services land
Checkpoint A UI-level test: kill mid-capture after shutter, relaunch, issue+photo recovered correctly
Camera permission-denied/unavailable states each shown distinctly with retry/Settings path

tasks.title: Scaffold Xcode project at /Users/pchordia/Documents/GitHub/truescale using Xcode's default nested-target layout (Truescale/ source folder, TruescaleTests/, TruescaleUITests/)
acceptance_criteria: Empty SwiftUI app builds and runs in Simulator
All three targets exist and are wired using Xcode's default nested folder convention
Committed as the literal first commit before any feature branch

tasks.title: Shared PhotoThumbnailView (three states) + shared empty/permission-denied state views
acceptance_criteria: pending-processing renders distinctly from missing/corrupted, no false-negative flash during normal capture
Used identically by Capture, IssueDetail, and Export call sites

tasks.title: Checkpoint B: full experiential golden-path scenario test
acceptance_criteria: First launch -> create project -> two areas -> five issues offline -> kill/relaunch mid-capture -> recover -> review by area, scripted end to end against real repositories/services with only camera/AR faked

tasks.title: IssueFilter performance validation at low-hundreds-of-issues scale
acceptance_criteria: Filters return correct sets against a seeded low-hundreds-of-issues dataset within a defined responsiveness bound

tasks.title: Issues segment UI: filter sheet, list, empty-filtered-result state
acceptance_criteria: Filters apply live against persisted data
Empty-filtered-result state has a one-tap clear-filters action
Issue rows visibly show measurement source

tasks.title: Issue Detail screen
acceptance_criteria: Edits write immediately per field
Delete uses native .confirmationDialog
Photo-state rendering matches Capture exactly

tasks.title: ReportSnapshotBuilder + Sendable report snapshot structs (pure data, no PDFKit)
acceptance_criteria: Snapshot never carries a SwiftData model reference off-main
Missing/corrupted photo produces placeholder metadata, never a build failure
Zero-issue section handled without crashing export

tasks.title: PDF report rendering (PDFKit/Core Graphics) — concrete adapter, stays in services_utilities per tech_specs interfaces-json
acceptance_criteria: Renders from snapshot + entitlement only, never queries StoreKit internally
Rendered sample PDF passes an explicit human send-to-a-client review before this task is called done

tasks.title: Export/Report Preview screen + share sheet
acceptance_criteria: generating/preview-ready/partial-degradation/failure states all present
Share sheet exports a real file fully offline

tasks.title: EntitlementService (StoreKit 2, Transaction.updates, scenePhase recheck, restore) — built before any paywall UI consumes it
acceptance_criteria: Entitlement snapshot refreshed only at foreground/launch, never mid-session
Restore verified against local StoreKit config file, explicitly not live App Store

tasks.title: Project-creation cap enforcement + non-destructive downgrade lock
acceptance_criteria: Cap enforced only at project-creation checkpoint
Over-cap projects go read-only, never deleted
Verified across simulated foreground transitions with stale vs refreshed entitlement

tasks.title: Paywall/Upgrade screen, Settings entitlement display, locked-project badge (built after real cap enforcement exists, never before)
acceptance_criteria: Paywall triggers only at cap-hit or from Settings
Locked projects show the badge and disable edit/export while remaining viewable

tasks.title: Real ARMeasurementService with three-state gating (unsupported/unstable/ready) + green/amber exit decision — late, additive, only after the full golden path is proven
acceptance_criteria: All three states verified via protocol injection with zero physical hardware
Field-accuracy is explicitly never claimed
Green/amber exit decision documented in the task's closing note before this task can be marked done

tasks.title: MeasurementField AR-branching content + AR labeling
acceptance_criteria: One sheet, internally branching manual/AR content, never two sheet types
AR source labeled distinctly from manual in UI, IssueRow, and Export

tasks.title: Accessibility pass across all screens
acceptance_criteria: Dynamic Type never truncates chip labels
Full VoiceOver labels present
AA contrast verified against the locked dark palette
No state communicated by color alone

tasks.title: Job-volume scenario test + final build verification
acceptance_criteria: One project, dozen-plus areas, low-hundreds issues, mixed photo/measurement states stays responsive
Every screen's empty/loading/success/error states verified present
BUILD_VERIFICATION.md states plainly what AR did or didn't achieve, signed off by all four lanes
